_comment: Extracted from uploaded squadron card image — verify against Rules Reference v1.5.0 if used beyond MT setup

keyword_reminder_text.Counter: After a squadron performs a non-counter attack against you, you may attack that squadron with an anti-squadron armament of 2 blue dice, even if you are destroyed.
keyword_reminder_text.Swarm: While attacking a squadron engaged with another squadron, you may reroll 1 die.
